hero.title: ProcrastiMate
hero.subtitle: Automate your procrastination.
hero.description: We don't fight procrastination — we make it a system. A smart anti-productivity assistant that honestly tells you when to stop and helps you postpone things with maximum efficiency.

card1.title: You're not lazy — you're overheated
card1.description: Your brain isn't broken. It's just tired from endless sprints. We help you legalize rest.

card2.title: Procrastination as a system
card2.description: Instead of chaotic postponing — a structured approach. Plan your procrastination like a professional.

card3.title: Cynical, but honest
card3.description: No motivational quotes. Just the truth about how you actually spend your day.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Welcome back. We knew you'd return.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: The first step to professional procrastination.

dashboard.cynicalLow: You haven't warmed up yet. And it's suspiciously comfortable.
dashboard.cynicalMid: Not bad. But could be better.
dashboard.cynicalHigh: You're at your peak. Or is it an illusion?

breakCard.title: You officially overheated
breakCard.description: Time to rest and watch kittens.

dashboard.overheatNotification: Overheating detected. Consider taking a break.

tasks.title: Tasks & Slots
tasks.closeDaySummary: Today you productively rested for {time}. {remaining} {tasks} survived this day. You earned a reboot.
tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Perfect day, honestly.
tasks.dayClosedSubtitle: Or did you decide to keep going?

breakModal.timeoutText: Who are you trying to prove something to? Better prove to me that Earth is round. Pour some coffee.

activeSession.overtime: Running {time} over (could've had tea and thought about Burj Khalifa)

breakSuggestion.message: You're overheating. Maybe take a break?

funEngine.title: Distraction Engine
funEngine.noEmbed: YouTube search results cannot be embedded
funEngine.noContent: No content available. Try again later.

rest.title: Just Rest
rest.message: Rest. When you're ready — press the button.

overheating.highSubtitle: You're running hot. Time to step back before burnout.
overheating.chaosSubtitle: You've exceeded safe productivity limits. Mandatory cooldown recommended.
overheating.videoFallback: Video unavailable. Take a deep breath instead.

overheating.1: {minutes} minutes without a break. Trying to impress someone?
overheating.2: {sessions} sessions in a row. That's not focus — that's personality.
overheating.3: {hours} hours deep in work. Even I'm getting tired for you.
overheating.4: {minutes} minutes without moving. Your back would like a word.
overheating.5: {sessions} sessions straight. Breaks officially feel ignored.
overheating.6: {minutes} minutes of focus. Testing the limit?
overheating.7: {streak} sessions in a row. That's almost legendary.
overheating.8: {hours} hours in. Your eyes are asking for a blink.
overheating.10: {sessions} sessions straight. Even coffee looks concerned.
overheating.11: {minutes} minutes without pause. Stats are getting nervous.
overheating.13: {hours} hours. Impressive. But you're still human.
overheating.15: {sessions} sessions. Maybe slow down a little?
overheating.16: {minutes} minutes already. This feels more like stubbornness.
overheating.17: {streak} sessions in a row. Respect. Take care of yourself.
overheating.18: {hours} hours of focus. Machines don't even run like this.

absurd.1: This stopped being a day and became performance art.
absurd.2: Your stats went for a walk without you.
absurd.3: Numbers have slightly lost their meaning.
absurd.4: You bent the curve of normal.
absurd.5: This looks like a meme without a picture.
absurd.6: Are we in a parallel universe? Feels like it.
absurd.8: This is dangerously close to art.
absurd.11: The logs are whispering something strange.
absurd.12: Is this a new competitive sport?
absurd.13: Statistics are looking at you with respect.
absurd.14: You stepped slightly outside the frame.
absurd.15: The simulation paused for a second.
absurd.16: This is too clean to be completely sane.

idle.1: The day passed in 'just existing' mode. That's allowed.
idle.2: Nothing happened. There's a calm in that.
idle.3: The list is empty. You're still here.
idle.4: You chose pause. It suits you.
idle.6: It was simply a day. No drama required.
idle.7: You didn't break anything. That counts.
idle.8: A slower rhythm. It has its own music.

short.1: Walk around the room backwards for a minute.
short.2: Move three things on your desk and declare a revolution.
short.5: Roll your neck gently and look for the lost thought.
short.6: Wink at your reflection and wait for it to respond.
short.7: Clench your fists, then let go.
short.8: Walk across the room stepping only on shadows.
short.9: Give your chair a name and a dramatic backstory.
short.10: Count the corners in the room and decide which one is suspicious.
